pr.title: Non-record: MLX prototyping harness with validated technique stack (val_bpb=1.9588, Mac)

output.summary: Mac MLX harness validates KV2/MLP3x stacks with int6 quant, FP16 tied embeddings, Muon WD, and compiled sliding-window multi-eval to shrink quant gaps.
techniques: KV2 + 10-14L MLP3x stacks with phase-transition init
Int6 per-row quant + FP16 tied embeddings under Muon decoupled WD
Compiled sliding-window multi-eval harness for MLX experiments
